headline: Roommate Says 'I'll Do The Dishes Tomorrow' For 47th Consecutive Day
summary: The science experiment growing in the sink has been named 'Gregory' and has its own Instagram.
fullBody: Chad Procrastinelli's pile of dishes has achieved sentience. 'It's a living ecosystem now,' his roommate Jenna reported. The mold colony has been documented daily on the account @GregoryTheGrowth, which has 47,000 followers. Chad claims he's 'waiting for the right motivation.' Jenna has started eating exclusively from paper plates. Gregory has been offered a sponsorship from a probiotic brand.
